title: GalliCraft Server Modpack
description: A server modpack for our community MC server.
body:
A rather thick Vanilla+ style modpack released for our multiplayer Quilt server never meant for public consumption. However, so I can keep this pack available to my friends this pack has needed to be adjusted as per Modrinth moderator request. This description will be periodically adjusted as necessary, however for the most recent additions/subtractions to this modpack, please look to the version history/changelog of newer versions.

This pack is needed to play on our self-hosted Minecraft server. Currently, the server is private, and this pack is mainly used to help our members have a much better ease of access to mod downloading so they can hop in and play without having to find a list of downloads. Obviously, if you find this pack somehow while unlisted, you can feel free to enjoy it on singleplayer yourself.

Mods are owned by their respective authors, packaged from Modrinth pages unless absolutely necessary to pick a mod from Curseforge (Usually because an update hasn't occurred on Modrinth yet). I'll be trying to find any missing credit's still due as necessary. If something is missed, please send me a message on discord (Can find in my profile Bio)

Specific credits for some mods in this pack:
- Mods:
    - [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective) from Doctor4t (Rat on Modrinth)
    - [Sketch Macaw's Furniture Suite](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sketch_macaw/projects) including Macaw's [Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture), [Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paintings), [Roofs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs), [Windows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows), [Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges), [Doors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors), [Fences & Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls), [Path's & Pavings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paths-and-pavings), [Light's & Lamps](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps), [Trapdoors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors), and [Holidays](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-holidays)

- Resource Packs:
    - [Arachnophobia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/arachnophobia) by Muse31 as it's only available via CurseForge
    - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), and [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions) by FreshLX
